instance (K : Type*) [CommRing K] [ValuativeRel K]
    (L : Type*) [CommRing L] [ValuativeRel L]
    [Algebra K L] [ValuativeExtension K L] :
    Algebra 𝒪[K] 𝒪[L] where
  algebraMap := {
    toFun r := ⟨algebraMap K L r.1, by
      have h₁ : (val : L → WithBot ℕ) (algebraMap K L (r : K)) ≤ 1 := by
        have h₂ : (val : K → WithBot ℕ) (r : K) ≤ 1 := by
          simpa [Valuation.mem_integer_iff] using r.2
        have h₃ : (val : L → WithBot ℕ) (algebraMap K L (r : K)) ≤ (val : K → WithBot ℕ) (r : K) := by
          apply instValuativeExtension.map_le_self
          <;> simp_all [algebraMap]
          <;>
          try
            (try infer_instance) <;>
            (try simp_all [algebraMap]) <;>
            (try
              {
                apply instValuativeExtension.isRingHom
              })
          <;>
          (try
            {
              simpa [RingHom] using inst_valuative_extension.is_ring_hom
            })
        exact le_trans h₃ h₂
      simpa [Valuation.mem_integer_iff] using h₁
    ⟩
    map_add' := by
      intro r s
      simp [Int.cast_add, Subtype.ext_iff, add_assoc]
      <;>
      simp_all [add_assoc]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_cast at *
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      try norm_num
      <;>
      try linarith
    map_one' := by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [one_mul]
      <;>
      norm_cast
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      try norm_num
      <;>
      try linarith
    map_mul' := by
      intro r s
      simp [Int.cast_mul, Subtype.ext_iff, mul_assoc]
      <;>
      simp_all [mul_assoc]
      <;>
      ring_nf at *
      <;>
      norm_cast at *
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      try norm_num
      <;>
      try linarith
    map_zero' := by
      simp [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      simp_all [zero_mul]
      <;>
      norm_cast
      <;>
      simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
      <;>
      try norm_num
      <;>
      try linarith
  }

        have h₃ : (val : L → WithBot ℕ) (algebraMap K L (r : K)) ≤ (val : K → WithBot ℕ) (r : K) := by
